category_sources: Official IDSgrep homepage describes a general tree-matching utility for querying Han-script character structure databases.
source_facts.description says it greps for Extended Ideographic Description Sequences.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to the IDSgrep user's manual PDF.
Official manual is hosted on the project site and titled IDSgrep user manual.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was confirmed from source_facts or the official homepage; the homepage provides the release tarball and manual instead.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes structural kanji search, Han-script character structures, and Unicode Ideographic Description Sequences.
source_facts.description identifies Extended Ideographic Description Sequences.
